title: Bosses of Mass Destruction Forge
description: WIP mod that adds boss fights to Minecraft
body:
![header](https://i.imgur.com/lcc22tx.png)

**Are you looking to add some more exciting boss fights to your world? The aim of this mod is to create epic endgame boss fights.**  

**This is an unofficial port of Barribob's Bosses of Mass Destruction mod from Fabric to Forge. Click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) to go to the original project.**

Right now, this mod has four bosses.

- Night Lich, found in rare towers in cold biomes. Locate the towers by following soul stars.
- Obsidilith, which appears in rare structures in the end islands.
- Nether Gauntlet, which appears in rare structures in the nether. 
- Void Blossom, appears in rare caves at the bottom of the world. Void lilies will point the way.
- They can be accessed in creative via the /summon command.

Installation:

Installed like any regular Forge mod with dependencies below.

[CERBON's API (1.20.1+)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cerbons-api)

[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

# Support

Please report all bugs, issues, and feature requests to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/CERBON-MODS/Bosses-of-Mass-Destruction-FORGE/issues) or use my [discord server](https://discord.gg/2PvYZfjWDf) and report at the appropriate channel. Please leave the comment section only for comments about the mod or simple questions.

Please read the [FAQ](https://github.com/CERBON-MODS/Bosses-of-Mass-Destruction-FORGE/blob/master/FAQ.md) before reporting a bug, issue or feature request.
